sqlMap.select: select * from refdropdown where referenceno = #referenceno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#

select refdropdownno, property, seq, referenceno, metaobjectno, structureno from refdropdown where refdropdownno = #refdropdownno# and referenceno = #referenceno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.update:
update refdropdown set
property = #property# property = null seq = #seq# seq = null
where refdropdownno = #refdropdownno# and referenceno = #referenceno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.delete: delete from refdropdown where refdropdownno = #refdropdownno# and referenceno = #referenceno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
delete from refdropdown where referenceno = #referenceno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.select: select refdropdownno, property, seq, referenceno, metaobjectno, structureno from refdropdown where refdropdownno = #refdropdownno# and referenceno = #referenceno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
select refdropdownno, referenceno, metaobjectno, structureno, property, seq from refdropdown where referenceno = #referenceno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
